description: Curate a set of automated nuclear segmentations for a training dataset. Using the microscopy image (~/Fiji_Data/curation/training_image.tif) and the preliminary ROIs in ~/Fiji_Data/curation/automated_segmentation.zip, correct the segmentation errors by removing the ROI labeled 'False_Positive_Noise' and replacing the 'Merged_Error' ROI with two distinct ROIs covering the individual nuclei. Save the final corrected set of ROIs to ~/Fiji_Data/curation/curated_ground_truth.zip.
